The '''Void Spider TX-3 Air Taxi''', also called '''''Void Spider THX 1138''''', was an enclosed [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]] built by [[Bespin Motors/Legends|Bespin Motors]] and a type of [[Air taxi/Legends|air taxi]]. It had a length of 7.6 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] and came equipped with eight engines, placed at the bottom of eight legs. These supported the speeder when on the ground and could function independently in the air.

A Void Spider was in the streets of [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] when [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], and Skywalker's [[Droid/Legends|droids]] arrived there shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="ANH">{{Film|IV}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
This vehicle could be seen in Mos Eisley in {{Film|IV}},<ref name="ANH" /> and blueprints of the prop were featured in the [[1977]] ''[[Star Wars Blueprints]]'' collections. Those blueprints named it "The Void-Spider Land-Speeder TX-3."<ref name="Blueprints">''[[Star Wars Blueprints]]''</ref>

''[[Mission to Lianna]]'' describes the Void Spider TX-3 as a landspeeder, with a maximum altitude of only one meter. The [[The Star Wars Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''Star Wars Sourcebook'']] mentions that it's one of the most popular [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeders]] (instead of airspeeder), but doesn't give more details.
